selection_method: ai-keywords.md 打分 + 90 天选题历史去重 + Claude 二判（信息密度/数据可信度/多样性）

selected.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets
selected.readme_source: git clone --depth 1 (api.github.com blocked for non-attached repos, fell back to clone per task instructions)
key_facts: first open-source foundation model for financial candlesticks (K-lines)
trained on data from 45+ global exchanges
two-stage: tokenizer quantizes OHLCV into discrete tokens + autoregressive decoder-only Transformer
model zoo: mini 4.1M / small 24.7M / base 102.3M params, hosted on Hugging Face

selected.description: Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset, OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.
key_facts: originated as Alibaba's internal AI code review assistant, 2 years in production, tens of thousands of developers, millions of defects found
combines deterministic engineering (file selection/bundling/rule matching) with an LLM agent for dynamic review decisions
benchmark: 50 repos, 200 real PRs, 10 languages, 80+ senior engineers, 1505 annotated issues
vs general-purpose agents (Claude Code) with same underlying model: higher Precision/F1, ~1/9 tokens, lower recall as tradeoff

selected.description: A collection of agent skills for CAD, robotics and hardware design
key_facts: 11 agent skills: CAD, CAD Viewer, step.parts, DXF, URDF, SRDF, SDF, SendCutSend, G-code, Bambu Labs, Implicit CAD
generates STEP/STL/3MF/GLB CAD geometry from plain-language or image requests
installs into Claude Code / Codex as skills or plugins
reproducible benchmark prompts, e.g. a 100x60x20mm calibration block with four 8mm holes and a 2mm chamfer
